texto: Lenin refused to recognise moral norms established by slave-owners for their slaves and never observed by the slave-owners themselves
autor: he called upon the Proletariat to extend the class struggle into the moral sphere too. Who fawns before the precepts established by the enemy will never vanquish that enemy!
explicacao: Citação de he called upon the Proletariat to extend the class struggle into the moral sphere too. Who fawns before the precepts established by the enemy will never vanquish that enemy! sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Lenin refused to recognise moral norms established by slave-owners for their slaves and never obs…” articula reflexao, leon-trotsky, slave em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
